Who's behind the timeline

Technical precision.
Creative instinct.
Every single frame.

I'm Shokhrukh — a video editor and motion designer with 4+ years of experience turning raw footage into content that actually converts, captivates, and gets remembered.

From fast-paced Reels that hook in 3 seconds to cinematic brand films that leave a lasting impression — I bring technical precision and creative instinct to every single frame.

I work with creators, brands, and agencies who are serious about their visual identity.

"If you want edits that look like everyone else's — I'm probably not your guy. If you want something that stands out — let's talk."

Why editors come and go — and clients come back to me

4+ years of real-world experience

Across every major format and platform.

Motion graphics as a superpower

Most editors can cut. Few can animate.

AI-enhanced workflow

Faster delivery, smarter output, no compromise on quality.

One editor, full ownership

One creative mind invested in your project from start to finish.

24/7 Availability

Available around the clock — no time zone slows a project down.
